decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to generate card advantage through spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Consider while maintaining pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Cori-Steel Cutter and Gran-Gran. The deck also has interaction with cards like Divide by Zero and Combustion Technique to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base includes lands that can produce red and blue mana efficiently to support the spells and creatures in the deck. Overall, this deck aims to control the game tempo by combining aggression with card advantage.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by playing low-cost spells and creatures that can deal damage efficiently. The deck includes cards that allow for card draw, removal spells, and creatures with prowess abilities to enhance their damage output. The idea is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced, aggressive strategy while maintaining card advantage and control of the board. With a mix of burn spells, prowess creatures, and card draw, the deck aims to win the game quickly through a combination of direct damage and creature combat.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient creature strategy. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic to ramp up mana, combined with powerful creatures like Archon of Emeria and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain control of the battlefield. Collected Company and Skyclave Apparition provide additional tempo advantages, while Elspeth, Storm Slayer offers a powerful finisher. The deck's focus on aggressive plays and creature synergy sets it apart as a formidable aggro archetype in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying threats and disrupting the opponent with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Archon of Emeria. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, while also utilizing Collected Company to find additional threats. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive game plan with a mix of fast lands and mana producers. The deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game to secure a victory.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruption spells. By playing low-cost creatures like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves, the deck can quickly ramp up its mana to cast powerful threats like Archon of Emeria and Elspeth, Storm Slayer. Cards like Skyclave Apparition and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben provide disruption to the opponent's strategy, while Collected Company allows for explosive creature plays. The goal is to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress, as well as removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay. It also utilizes efficient creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Badgermole Cub to control the board. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's progress while generating value through cards like Culling Ritual and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. With a mix of control elements and powerful threats, this deck aims to outlast opponents and ultimately take over the game.

The main idea of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using a combination of cheap spells and creatures with prowess abilities. It aims to control the board early on and maintain pressure with efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage while supporting them with instant-speed spells like Fiery Impulse and Boomerang Basics. The deck also includes card draw and filtering effects to ensure a consistent flow of threats. With a focus on tempo and aggression, the deck seeks to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize or mount a defense.

This UW Control deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board through counterspells and removal spells while generating card advantage with card draw and manipulation effects. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent with powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and by utilizing the Companion mechanic with Yorion, Sky Nomad. The deck also includes win conditions like Ultima and Beza, the Bounding Spring to close out the game once the opponent has been sufficiently controlled. The key strategy is to maintain control of the game while steadily advancing towards victory.

This UW Control deck focuses on manipulating the opponent's resources and controlling the game through various spells and planeswalkers. With cards like Erode, Consult the Star Charts, and No More Lies, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain board control. Teferi, Hero of Dominaria, and Supreme Verdict provide additional control options, while Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Ultima offer win conditions. The deck also includes land destruction options like Field of Ruin and Restless Anchorage to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck excels at controlling the game and outlasting the opponent.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Greasefang Parhelion combo to overwhelm the opponent with powerful artifacts and creature tokens. The deck includes cards that enable fast and efficient mana production, disruption through hand disruption and removal spells, and synergistic cards like Parhelion II, Vanishing Verse, and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker to support the main combo. Bloodtithe Harvester and Fear of Missing Out provide additional win conditions, while additional utility cards like Torch the Tower and Voice of Victory help control the game and protect the combo pieces.

This deck focuses on control through a versatile array of spells and creatures, with a main focus on using Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful card advantage engine. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, ramp, and strong multicolored creatures to control the board and out-value opponents. Using Bring to Light to tutor up key spells and creatures, the deck aims to outlast opponents and win through incremental advantage and powerful late-game threats like Omnath, Locus of Creation and Niv-Mizzet, Supreme.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and board presence through a combination of removal spells and disruptive creatures. It aims to outvalue the opponent with card advantage and efficient removal, while also presenting a threat in the form of powerful creatures such as Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The deck utilizes a mix of hand disruption, creature removal, and card draw to maintain control of the game and grind out incremental advantages until it can overwhelm the opponent with its powerful threats.

This deck revolves around assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful synergy. The deck includes cards like Bleachbone Verge and Brightclimb Pathway to help fix mana and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Fleeting Spirit and Guardian of New Benalia provide additional support, while Monument to Endurance and Iron-Shield Elf help protect the combo pieces. Fatal Push and Concealed Courtyard offer removal options, making this deck a versatile and powerful choice for Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Archon of Emeria, Badgermole Cub, and Skyclave Apparition. Collected Company allows for explosive turns by casting creatures at instant speed. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben disrupts opponents' spells, while Enduring Innocence provides resilience against removal. Elspeth, Storm Slayer serves as a powerful finisher. The mana base is optimized with lands like Temple Garden and Razorverge Thicket to support the aggressive game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with early pressure and disruption.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with efficient creatures like Bishop of Wings and Resplendent Angel while utilizing cards like Collected Company to generate value and overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes various mana ramps such as Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic to help you play your spells earlier. With a mix of lifegain, creature removal, and powerful finishers like Righteous Valkyrie, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain board control to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Lotus Field, while controlling the board with spells like Scapeshift and Spelunking. By utilizing Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and Port of Karfell, the deck aims to generate a strong advantage in card advantage and tempo. The inclusion of Boseiju, Who Endures and Aftermath Analyst provide additional utility and protection for key spells. Lastly, the deck can finish off opponents with powerful creatures like Morlun, Devourer of Spiders and Glasspool Mimic, backed up by efficient mana generation from cards like Crumbling Vestige and Castle Garenbrig.
